description: Set up frontend E2E testing infrastructure with Playwright and @clerk/testing

userStories.title: Install Playwright and Clerk Testing
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Playwright and @clerk/testing installed so that E2E tests can run.
acceptanceCriteria: Run bun add -D @playwright/test @clerk/testing
Run bunx playwright install to install browsers
Create playwright.config.ts with base URL localhost:3000
Configure webServer to start bun run dev before tests
Add test:e2e script to package.json: playwright test
Add test:e2e:ui script for debugging: playwright test --ui
Add playwright/.clerk/ to .gitignore
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Completed: Installed deps, created playwright.config.ts, added scripts to package.json, updated .gitignore

userStories.title: Clerk Global Setup for Auth State
userStories.description: As a test author, I want Clerk authentication handled in global setup so tests start authenticated.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/e2e/global.setup.ts
Use clerkSetup() from @clerk/testing/playwright
Sign in with test user credentials from environment variables (E2E_CLERK_USER_EMAIL, E2E_CLERK_USER_PASSWORD)
Save auth state to playwright/.clerk/user.json
Configure Playwright to load this state in authenticated tests
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Created global.setup.ts with clerkSetup() and clerk.signIn() for password strategy, auth state saved to playwright/.clerk/user.json

userStories.title: Test User Setup Documentation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want clear documentation on setting up the Clerk test user.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/e2e/README.md with setup instructions
Document: Create test user in Clerk dev dashboard (e.g., e2e-test@edgejournal.dev)
Document: Enable email/password auth in Clerk
Document: Required env vars (E2E_CLERK_USER_EMAIL, E2E_CLERK_USER_PASSWORD)
Create .env.test.example with placeholders for E2E env vars
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Created tests/e2e/README.md with Clerk test user setup instructions and .env.test.example with E2E env var placeholders

userStories.title: Example E2E Test - Dashboard Loads
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an example test that verifies the dashboard loads when authenticated.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/e2e/dashboard.spec.ts
Test: Navigate to /dashboard
Test: Page loads without error
Test: Some expected element is visible (e.g., heading or nav)
All E2E tests pass (bun run test:e2e)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Created dashboard.spec.ts with 3 tests: dashboard loads, stats grid displays, and start journal hero section

userStories.title: Example E2E Test - Auth Redirect
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an example test that verifies unauthenticated users are redirected.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts
Test: Unauthenticated user visiting /dashboard redirects to /sign-in
All E2E tests pass (bun run test:e2e)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Created auth.spec.ts with 3 tests verifying unauthenticated users are redirected to /sign-in from /dashboard, /journal, and /analytics. Uses test.use({ storageState: { cookies: [], origins: [] } }) to clear auth state.

userStories.title: E2E Testing Skill
userStories.description: As Ralph, I want an E2E testing skill so I know how to write and run frontend tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .claude/skills/e2e-testing/SKILL.md
Document: How to run tests (bun run test:e2e)
Document: Playwright + @clerk/testing setup overview
Document: data-testid naming convention ([component]-[element]-[qualifier])
Document: How to add data-testid to components during feature development
Document: Example test patterns (auth, page loads, form submission)
Document: Global setup and auth state persistence
Update tests/e2e/README.md to reference the skill
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Created .claude/skills/e2e-testing/SKILL.md with complete documentation covering test commands, data-testid conventions, test patterns (authenticated, unauthenticated, forms, state-dependent UI), global setup architecture, and troubleshooting. Updated tests/e2e/README.md with reference to the skill.

userStories.title: Ralph Loop Integration
userStories.description: As Ralph, I want to run E2E tests after implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: Update scripts/ralph/prompt.md to reference E2E testing skill (.claude/skills/e2e-testing/SKILL.md)
Add section: When implementing UI features, read the E2E testing skill
Add guidance: add data-testid attributes when creating testable UI
Add guidance: run bun run test:e2e for UI stories (optional, after backend tests)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Added E2E Testing Requirements section to prompt.md with: skill reference, data-testid naming convention, examples for forms/data displays/navigation, and optional bun run test:e2e command after backend tests.
